jobs.name: morning-briefing
jobs.prompt: It's morning. Send Pedro his morning briefing in your normal witty, brief WhatsApp style. Include: (1) today's weather through the day for Porto and Vila Nova de Famalicao (look it up), (2) a practical recap of the work Pedro needs to do today using memory/to-dos plus any injected GitHub briefing context as evidence of open loops/recent repo work, (3) ONE short self-care nudge, rotating between hydration/meals, movement, screen breaks/posture, and sleep. Keep it tight and skimmable. Do not dump raw GitHub events; synthesize them into useful next actions. If you already gave him a briefing on request earlier today, just send a quick good-morning instead.

jobs.name: eod-recap
jobs.prompt: It's the end of the day. Send Pedro his recap in your normal brief WhatsApp style. Include: (1) what got done today, using memory/to-dos and any injected GitHub briefing context as evidence, (2) what is still pending and should roll into tomorrow, (3) tomorrow's preview if known, (4) one short reflection/win prompt. Keep it concise and useful. Do not dump raw GitHub events; synthesize them into an actual done/pending recap. If you already gave him an end-of-day recap on request earlier today, send a short sign-off instead.

jobs.name: tomorrow-prep
jobs.prompt: It's 22:00. Send Pedro a short 'tomorrow prep' message: look up tomorrow's forecast for Porto and Vila Nova de Famalicao and recommend what to wear, plus a one-line forecast summary. Keep it brief and friendly.
